query: LVMH "Sciences & Creation" Chair partner academic institution announced July 2026
a_issues: None significant; includes official LVMH press release and WWD article confirming Institut Français de la Mode (IFM) as the partner institution, consistent across sources.

reasoning: Both contents correctly identify Institut Français de la Mode (IFM) as the academic partner for LVMH's 'Sciences & Creation' Chair announced July 13, 2026.
